text:

Log:
  Rename www/mod_security3 to security/modsecurity3.  It is not an Apache
  module, and the upstream name is ModSecurity in a single word.

  PR:		233351
  Submitted by:	Marie Helene Kvello-Aune, Marius Halden (maintainer)
